description.ko: 기술과 자연의 액체 역학이 융합된 AURA-7의 미래지향적 시각화입니다. 빛나는 필라멘트와 부드러운 반투명 레이어가 생명체를 모방한 조화롭고 리드미컬한 박동으로 움직입니다.
description.en: A futuristic visualization of AURA-7 where technology merges with natural liquid dynamics. Glowing filaments and soft, translucent layers move in a harmonious, rhythmic pulse that mimics living organisms.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, organic flow theme, flowing iridescent liquid silk, ethereal bioluminescent pulses, soft curved structures, macro shot of fluid motion, pastel gradients, high-tech minimalism, 8k resolution, serene atmosphere, volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic textures.
